title: 2009 in Jungle Fight

infobox.value: [Jungle Fight 16](#Jungle_Fight_16) | October 17, 2009 | [Maracanãzinho Gymnasium](/wiki/Maracan%C3%A3zinho "Maracanãzinho") | [Rio de Janeiro](/wiki/Rio_de_Janeiro "Rio de Janeiro"), [Brazil](/wiki/Brazil "Brazil")

[Jungle Fight 15](#Jungle_Fight_15) | September 19, 2009 | [Pacaembu Gymnasium](/wiki/Gin%C3%A1sio_do_Pacaembu "Ginásio do Pacaembu") | [São Paulo](/wiki/S%C3%A3o_Paulo "São Paulo"), [Brazil](/wiki/Brazil "Brazil")

[Jungle Fight 14: Ceará](#Jungle_Fight_14:_Cear.C3.A1) | May 9, 2009 | [Paulo Sarasate Gymnasium](/wiki/Gin%C3%A1sio_Paulo_Sarasate "Ginásio Paulo Sarasate") | [Fortaleza](/wiki/Fortaleza "Fortaleza"), [Brazil](/wiki/Brazil "Brazil")
[Jungle Fight 13: Qualifying Fortaleza](#Jungle_Fight_13:_Qualifying_Fortaleza) | March 28, 2009 | Fighter Sport Academy | [Fortaleza](/wiki/Fortaleza "Fortaleza"), [Brazil](/wiki/Brazil "Brazil")
[Jungle Fight 12: Warriors 2](#Jungle_Fight_12:_Warriors_2) | March 21, 2009 | Team Nogueira Training Center | [Rio de Janeiro](/wiki/Rio_de_Janeiro "Rio de Janeiro"), [Brazil](/wiki/Brazil "Brazil")

is the seventh year in the history of [Jungle Fight](/wiki/Jungle_Fight "Jungle Fight"), a [mixed martial arts](/wiki/Mixed_martial_arts "Mixed martial arts") promotion based in Brazil. In 2009 Jungle Fight held 5 events beginning with, *Jungle Fight 12: Warriors 2*.

["Jungle Fight 12: Warriors 2"](http://www.sherdog.com/events/JF-12-Warriors-9820). [Sherdog](/wiki/Sherdog "Sherdog"). [Archived](https://web.archive.org/web/20150702220656/http://www.sherdog.com/events/JF-12-Warriors-9820) from the original on July 2, 2015.

["Jungle Fight 13: Qualifying Fortaleza"](http://www.sherdog.com/events/Jungle-Fight-13-Qualifying-Fortaleza-11225). [Sherdog](/wiki/Sherdog "Sherdog"). [Archived](https://web.archive.org/web/20150702232756/http://www.sherdog.com/events/Jungle-Fight-13-Qualifying-Fortaleza-11225) from the original on July 2, 2015.

["Jungle Fight 14: Ceará"](http://www.sherdog.com/events/Jungle-Fight-14-Ceara-10046). [Sherdog](/wiki/Sherdog "Sherdog"). [Archived](https://web.archive.org/web/20150702211625/http://www.sherdog.com/events/Jungle-Fight-14-Ceara-10046) from the original on July 2, 2015.

["Jungle Fight 15"](http://www.sherdog.com/events/JF-Jungle-Fight-15-11099). [Sherdog](/wiki/Sherdog "Sherdog"). [Archived](https://web.archive.org/web/20150702221706/http://www.sherdog.com/events/JF-Jungle-Fight-15-11099) from the original on July 2, 2015.

["Jungle Fight 16"](http://www.sherdog.com/events/JF-Jungle-Fight-16-11100). [Sherdog](/wiki/Sherdog "Sherdog"). [Archived](https://web.archive.org/web/20150702202532/http://www.sherdog.com/events/JF-Jungle-Fight-16-11100) from the original on July 2, 2015.

first_paragraph: The year **2009** is the seventh year in the history of [Jungle Fight](/wiki/Jungle_Fight "Jungle Fight"), a [mixed martial arts](/wiki/Mixed_martial_arts "Mixed martial arts") promotion based in Brazil. In 2009 Jungle Fight held 5 events beginning with, *Jungle Fight 12: Warriors 2*.

The year **2009** is the seventh year in the history of [Jungle Fight](/wiki/Jungle_Fight "Jungle Fight"), a [mixed martial arts](/wiki/Mixed_martial_arts "Mixed martial arts") promotion based in Brazil. In 2009 Jungle Fight held 5 events beginning with, *Jungle Fight 12: Warriors 2*.

## Events list

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=2009_in_Jungle_Fight&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Events list")]

Main article: [Jungle Fight § Events](/wiki/Jungle_Fight#Events "Jungle Fight")

| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 16 | [Jungle Fight 16](#Jungle_Fight_16) | October 17, 2009 | [Maracanãzinho Gymnasium](/wiki/Maracan%C3%A3zinho "Maracanãzinho") | [Rio de Janeiro](/wiki/Rio_de_Janeiro "Rio de Janeiro"), [Brazil](/wiki/Brazil "Brazil") |
| 15 | [Jungle Fight 15](#Jungle_Fight_15) | September 19, 2009 | [Pacaembu Gymnasium](/wiki/Gin%C3%A1sio_do_Pacaembu "Ginásio do Pacaembu") | [São Paulo](/wiki/S%C3%A3o_Paulo "São Paulo"), [Brazil](/wiki/Brazil "Brazil") |
| 14 | [Jungle Fight 14: Ceará](#Jungle_Fight_14:_Cear.C3.A1) | May 9, 2009 | [Paulo Sarasate Gymnasium](/wiki/Gin%C3%A1sio_Paulo_Sarasate "Ginásio Paulo Sarasate") | [Fortaleza](/wiki/Fortaleza "Fortaleza"), [Brazil](/wiki/Brazil "Brazil") |
| 13 | [Jungle Fight 13: Qualifying Fortaleza](#Jungle_Fight_13:_Qualifying_Fortaleza) | March 28, 2009 | Fighter Sport Academy | [Fortaleza](/wiki/Fortaleza "Fortaleza"), [Brazil](/wiki/Brazil "Brazil") |
| 12 | [Jungle Fight 12: Warriors 2](#Jungle_Fight_12:_Warriors_2) | March 21, 2009 | Team Nogueira Training Center | [Rio de Janeiro](/wiki/Rio_de_Janeiro "Rio de Janeiro"), [Brazil](/wiki/Brazil "Brazil") |

## Jungle Fight 12: Warriors 2

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=2009_in_Jungle_Fight&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Jungle Fight 12: Warriors 2")]

Jungle Fight 12: Warriors 2[[1]](#cite_note-1) was an event held on March 21, 2009 at The Team Nogueira Training Center in [Rio de Janeiro](/wiki/Rio_de_Janeiro "Rio de Janeiro"), [Brazil](/wiki/Brazil "Brazil").

|  | Andre Tadeu | def. | Robson Relma | Decision (Unanimous) | 3 | 5:00 |  |

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=2009_in_Jungle_Fight&action=edit&section=8 "Edit section: Jungle Fight 15")]

Jungle Fight 15[[4]](#cite_note-4) was an event held on September 19, 2009 at The [Pacaembu Gymnasium](/wiki/Gin%C3%A1sio_do_Pacaembu "Ginásio do Pacaembu") in [São Paulo](/wiki/S%C3%A3o_Paulo "São Paulo"), [Brazil](/wiki/Brazil "Brazil").
